sections.content:
ACTION7 is not a valid action. The blue target is still not collected. Looking at the image, the path extends to the blue target but the blue target is still there. Maybe I need to extend the path further to "cover" the blue target completely, or maybe I need to retract the path and then extend it again.
Wait, let me reconsider. When I collected the red and green targets, the path was extended to touch them and they were collected. But the blue target is still there. Let me check if the path actually reaches the blue target.
Looking at the image, the path seems to end at the blue target but not fully cover it. Maybe I need to extend the path one more time to fully cover the blue target.
But when I tried RIGHT, the board didn't change. So the path can't extend further.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe the blue target needs to be collected in a different way. Or maybe I need to retract the path first and then extend it again.
Actually, wait - looking at the bottom bar, the blue block appears highlighted (similar to red and green). But the blue target on the right is still there. Maybe the bottom bar is just showing the available targets, not the collected ones.
Let me try retracting the path and then extending it again to see if the blue target gets collected.
